scripts.db:list:local: wrangler d1 execute indemnipy --local --command "SELECT email, created_at FROM subscribers ORDER BY created_at DESC;"
scripts.db:list: wrangler d1 execute indemnipy --remote --command "SELECT email, created_at FROM subscribers ORDER BY created_at DESC;"
scripts.db:count: wrangler d1 execute indemnipy --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM subscribers;"
